title: Managed Repo Platform Adoption Bridge
purpose: Tasieron repo icindeki backend/frontend altyapisini orchestrator tarafina tasimak icin kaynak envanteri, hedef katman ve core-lock uyumlu degisiklik planini tanimlar.

required_core_changes: managed repo diagnostics registry'nin sync kapsamina alinmasi
frontend-doctor artifact yollarinin standards sync map'ine eklenmesi
ui-library route smoke kontratinin multi-repo operating contract altina alinmasi
ui-kit / shell / diagnostics blueprint'lerinin orchestrator onboarding contract'ina eklenmesi
service communication matrix + schema ownership planinin orchestrator ingestion modeli ile hizalanmasi

constraints: CORE_UNLOCK yokken orchestrator core dosyalarina yazim yapilmaz.
Taşıma islemi once contract/policy/sync seviyesinde yapilir; kod kopyalama ikinci fazdir.
Managed repo backend/frontend altyapisi dogrudan referans substrate olarak kabul edilir; yeniden sifirdan yazilmaz.
next_when_core_unlock_available: AI-MULTIREPO-OPERATING-CONTRACT.v1.md altina frontend diagnostics / doctor required evidence eklenir
module-delivery gate required checks set'ine frontend-doctor rapor varligi baglanir
orchestrator portfolio status icine managed repo diagnostics health ozeti eklenir
